creator: contactk@hotmail.com
text:
hey when will the sparc port be -stable? i am itching to try those sun
netra's out with fbsd

> >Description:
> The kaffe virtual machine port is completely unuseable since the virtual
machine fails to execute
> any java programs.
>
> >How-To-Repeat:
> 1) Install /usr/ports/java/kaffe port (1.0.5)
> 2) cd /usr/ports/java/kaffe/work/kaffe-1.0.5/test/regression
>    make check
>
>    or try any other java programs
